name: Rogz Dog ginz-Treat Ball 4.9cm - Blue Small
description: The Rogz Dog Grinz-Treat Ball is a durable, interactive treat-dispensing toy designed for small dogs, promoting mental stimulation, exercise, and safe play. Key Features: Interactive Treat Dispenser: Fill the ball with your dog’s favorite treats. As your dog plays, treats gradually fall out, keeping them engaged and active. Material & Durability: Made from SEBS thermoplastic rubber, soft on teeth yet firm enough to bounce for a fun chase experience. Floating Capability: Floats on water, perfect for fetch both on land and in shallow water. Fun Design: The unique “teeth” pattern creates a humorous effect when carried in your dog’s mouth. Ideal Size: 4.9 cm (≈2 in) diameter, perfect for small breeds. Bounce & Comfort: Medium firmness provides a comfortable bite and playful bounce without harming gums. Safe & Non-toxic: Free from harmful materials, supporting healthy chewing and dental care. Additional Information: Weight: ~20 ga Available Colors: Blue, Red, Orange, Pink, Lime Usage: Great for physical activity, mental stimulation, treat-reward training, and enrichment. Care: Supervise play and regularly inspect for damage. Play Benefits: Reduces boredom and keeps dogs mentally stimulated. Encourages physical activity through chase and fetch. Promotes healthy chewing habits. Can slow down treat consumption, adding a fun challenge to snacking. Widely appreciated for its durability, engaging design, and suitability for small dogs, the Rogz Dog Grinz-Treat Ball is a must-have for interactive indoor and outdoor play.
